assigneeType: The default assignee when creating issues for this project, e.g. 'PROJECT_LEAD'
description: A brief description of the project
key: Key of the project to be created, e.g. 'NP' (required)
name: Name of the project (required)
projectTypeKey: 'software'/'service_desk'/'business'. Either ProjectType Key or ProjectTemplateKey is required
url: A link to information about this project, such as project documentation
